a100_80gb_policy: A100-SXM4-80GB is not justified by design-gate work.
a100_policy: A100 training is not allowed from Phase 95; at most Phase 96 local smoke may be opened.
candidate_mechanisms: Bayesian active collocation selection with uncertainty and residual proxies
small meta-initialization/adaptation probe over related PDE coefficients
leakage_controls: fixed analytic train/validation/test grids before selecting mechanism
no test-set selection of acquisition strategy or hyperparameters
all random seeds and generated fields written to manifest
not_a_claim: not a replacement for Phase 55/60/74 spot_size floor
not permission for A100 broad12/broad21 training
paper_facing_hypothesis: A lightweight physics benchmark can test whether Green's-function features, Bayesian/adaptive sampling, or meta-learning adaptation have a measurable mechanistic signal before any AM-Bench or A100 validation.
